feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Route 12 with the Poke Flute.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red guarded the Route 12 boardwalk while Antman prepared to wake Snorlax.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill confirmed the Poke Flute signal can cut through the last sleep echo on Route 12.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Snorlax woke as a Route 12 static encounter.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight's sleep echo on Route 12 was cleared.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Snorlax roadblock has been cleared.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill marked Route 12's southbound path as open for the next Kanto leg.
